subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God! Thou seest me turning towards the ocean of Thy bounty, the heaven of Thy grace, and the horizon of Thy favors, wholly turned unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی ترانی مقبلا الی بحر جودک و سماء فضلک و افق الطافک و متوجها
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @prayer for teaching, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
